reason: Root Dockerfile line 13 has EXPOSE 3000 but the service defaults to port 1234 (bin/agentic-service.js). The install/Dockerfile correctly uses EXPOSE 1234. Docker healthcheck in docker-compose.yml targets localhost:1234. This mismatch was flagged by DBB monitor as a port inconsistency.
proposedChange:
Change line 13 of root Dockerfile from:
  EXPOSE 3000
to:
  EXPOSE 1234
resolution: Valid code fix. Created task for developer to fix root Dockerfile EXPOSE 3000→1234.
